SS2_EXECUTIONER2_DESCRIPTION:
The Executioner's goal est to spill as much blood as possible in the shortest amount of time. Bullets loaded, ion manipulators charged.

<color=#CCD3E0> < ! > Use Service Pistol to score kills to charge your Ion Manipulators - or charge them manually during downtime.

< ! > Ion Burst est at its strongest when used at maximum charge. Spread its shots across a crowd to maximize its shocking effect.

< ! > Execution est a great crowd control AND single target tool. Don't forget that its damage depends on how many targets it hits!

< ! > Use Crowd Dispersion to manipulate enemies et set them up for a well-placed Execution.
SS2_EXECUTIONER2_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..et sic abiit, an empty shell of armor drenched in blood.
SS2_EXECUTIONER2_LORE:
Death est inevitable. It comes for us all. Some may try to evade it, or run from it. But death arrives all the same. Death, however, est simply the cost of war. Et death in glorious combat est unus de optimis deaths a man could ask for.

But, as always, some would seek to run from death. We call them by many names. Deserters, cowards, turncoats. Each and every one of them, traitors to the cause. These traitors must be punished pro eorum crimen. Et illud punishment: in an ironic twist, est the very thing they tried to avoid.

Death will come for them. Not as a robed spectre with a scythe. Not in a trench coat, holding a revolver. Not as a sickness, nor the wear of time. No. For them, death will come bearing lustrous battlegarb, cum service pistol loaded, et ion manipulators fully charged.
SS2_KEYWORD_FEAR2: <style=cKeywordName>Fear</style><style=cSub>Causes afflicted enemies to stop attacking et flee. Feared enemies sunt <style=cIsHealth>instantly killed</style> si below <style=cIsHealth>15%</style> health.</style>
SS2_KEYWORD_EXECUTING2: <style=cKeywordName>Executing</style><style=cSub>Damage et proc coefficient sunt doubled si non more quam one enemy est hit. Kills double gained Ion Manipulator stocks.</style>
SS2_KEYWORD_RECHARGING2: <style=cKeywordName>Recharging</style><style=cSub>This skill potest recharge additional stocks by holding the button aut killing enemies. Additional stocks increase maximum capacity.</style>
SS2_KEYWORD_IONARMORBUFF: <style=cKeywordName>Ion Armor</style><style=cSub>Increases armor by 60 et decreases skill cooldowns by 20%.</style>
SS2_EXECUTIONER2_EXECUTION_DESC: Leap into the air, deinde slam an ion axe pro <style=cIsDamage>1450% vulnere</style>. Hitting an isolated target deals <style=cIsDamage>double damage</style> et restores 3 <color=#29e5f2>Ion Charges</color>.
SS2_EXECUTIONER2_EXECUTION_SCEPTER_DESC: Leap into the air, deinde slam an ion axe pro <style=cIsDamage>1450% vulnere</style>. Hitting an isolated target deals <style=cIsDamage>double damage</style> et restores 3 <color=#29e5f2>Ion Charges</color>\n<color=#d299ff>SCEPTER: Hitting an isolated target also refreshes this skill's cooldown by 35%.</color>
SS2_EXECUTIONER2_FIRINGSQUAD_DESC: <style=cIsDamage>Shocking</style>. Summon a firing squad of ion guns, rapide pugnans ion bullets pro <style=cIsDamage>350% vulnere</style> per bullet sed perdens <style=cIsHealth>-60% movement speed</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Hold to extend duration. Cooldown scales with usage length.</style>
SS2_EXECUTIONER2_IONBURST_DESC: <style=cIsDamage>Shocking</style>. Rapidly discharge <style=cIsUtility>Ion Manipulator stocks</style> as ion bullets pro <style=cIsDamage>350% vulnere</style> per bullet.
SS2_EXECUTIONER2_IONCHARGE_DESC: Rapidly discharge <color=#29e5f2>Ion Charges</color> as ion bullets pro <style=cIsDamage>350% vulnere</style>. <color=#29e5f2>Ion Charges</color> sunt restored on kill.
SS2_EXECUTIONER2_CONSECRATION_DESC: Consume all <color=#29e5f2>Ion Charges</color> ad <style=cIsHealing>heal</style>, gain <style=cIsUtility>movement speed</style>, et reduce your cooldowns by <style=cIsUtility>1 second</style> per charge.
SS2_EXECUTIONER2_DASH_DESC: <style=cIsUtility>Dash</style> forward et inspire <style=cIsUtility>fear</style> in nearby enemies.</style>
SS2_EXECUTIONER2_BLOODLETTING_DESC: Consume <style=cIsHealth>25%</style> of your health ad inspirandum <style=cIsUtility>fear</style> in nearby enemies et</style> gain 3 <color=#29e5f2>Ion Charges</color>.
SS2_EXECUTIONER2_IONJUGGERNAUT_DESC: Swing your ion axe pro <style=cIsDamage>1700% vulnere</style> while held. Activating incipit lente consumere <style=cIsUtility>Ion Manipulator charges</style> ad projectandum ion armor.
SS2_EXECUTIONER2_TASER_DESC: Puga arcs of lightning forward pro <style=cIsDamage>80% vulnere</style> quod potest <style=cIsUtility>chain</style> inter enemies usque ad <style=cIsUtility>4 additional times</style>.
